validationNote: Android Gradle Plugin extraction milestone verified by rerunning Rocket.Chat.ReactNative, eigen, and status-mobile from local validation-repos source checkouts.

beforeAfter.before: androidGradlePlugin was null despite com.android.tools.build:gradle and com.android.application usage.
beforeAfter.after: androidGradlePlugin is present-unknown and the report shows Present (version could not be determined).
beforeAfter.result: Resolved false absence; version remains unresolved because no version is declared in scanned Gradle files.

beforeAfter.before: androidGradlePlugin was null despite com.android.tools.build:gradle and com.android.application usage.
beforeAfter.after: androidGradlePlugin is present-unknown and the report shows Present (version could not be determined).
beforeAfter.result: Resolved false absence; version remains unresolved because no version is declared in scanned Gradle files.

beforeAfter.before: androidGradlePlugin was null even though android/gradle.properties declares gradlePluginVersion=7.4.2.
beforeAfter.after: androidGradlePlugin is 7.4.2 and the report shows Android Gradle Plugin: 7.4.2.
beforeAfter.result: Resolved AGP version extraction through Gradle properties.

beforeAfter.before: Mixed yarn.lock and package-lock.json were not surfaced.
beforeAfter.after: lockfiles includes yarn.lock and package-lock.json; hasMixedLockfiles is true; medium package-manager risk is added.
beforeAfter.result: Mixed package-manager state is visible in JSON, report, readiness, and migration tasks.

resolvedIssues: Android Gradle Plugin usage now reports present-unknown instead of null when plugin usage is detected but no version is locally declared.
Android Gradle Plugin versions can now resolve from Gradle properties such as gradlePluginVersion=7.4.2.
Typecheck script detection now recognizes hyphenated aliases, CI aliases, and embedded tsc/vue-tsc/tsc-files commands without matching unrelated words containing tsc.
Mixed package-manager lockfiles are now detected, reported, included in baseline readiness, and called out in migration tasks.
Bluetooth false positive from react-native-collapsible-tab-view in eigen removed by token-aware package matching.
Yarn patch React Native dependency in eigen now displays as 0.83.6 while preserving reactNativeRaw.
Expo SDK 35 React Native tarball in firebase-instagram now displays as a legacy Expo/RN baseline with staged recommendation.
status-mobile no longer has empty migration areas; fallback derives areas from dependencies when AST usage is sparse.
remainingTopAccuracyIssues: Android Gradle Plugin version remains unresolved when projects declare com.android.tools.build:gradle without a local version and rely on external Gradle/plugin metadata.
Some packageRules metadata remains unknown, including react-native-navigation and react-native-mmkv.
ClojureScript imports are still not parsed directly; status-mobile relies on dependency-derived fallback.
Legacy react-navigation can still be missed when fallback does not activate because other areas already exist.
Firebase/Auth area label is broad for analytics, messaging, and app packages.
Risk level and complexity/proposal divergence needs explanatory copy.
Expo SDK tarball normalization currently has only the SDK 35 legacy baseline mapping.
Dependency-derived areas identify package-level risk but not exact source files.
newIssuesIntroduced: No functional regressions observed in the AGP validation reruns for Rocket.Chat.ReactNative, eigen, and status-mobile.
Expected complexity changes occurred for eigen and status-mobile because area detection accuracy changed; scoring formulas were not changed.
recommendedNextPriorities: Resolve AGP versions supplied only by external Gradle convention plugins or remote React Native plugin metadata.
Expand packageRules metadata for packages already recognized by migration-area fallback.
Add source confidence labels to migration areas, such as AST-derived vs dependency-derived.

commandsRun: yarn tsc --noEmit --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/index.ts
notRun: firebase-instagram full source rerun: source checkout not present
In1Bank rerun: source checkout not present
Tourist Wallet rerun: source checkout not present
